  • Uses of DFA in it.tugamer89.autogex.algorithms

    Methods in it.tugamer89.autogex.algorithms that return DFA
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static DFA
    Converter.enfaToDfa(ENFA enfa)
    Convenience method that applies the full transformation chain: ENFA -> NFA -> DFA.
    static DFA
    Minimizer.minimize(DFA dfa)
    Minimizes a DFA, returning a new equivalent DFA with the minimum number of states.
    static DFA
    Converter.nfaToDfa(NFA nfa)
    Converts an NFA into a DFA.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static DFA
    Minimizer.minimize(DFA dfa)
    Minimizes a DFA, returning a new equivalent DFA with the minimum number of states.

    Exports a DFA to a DOT format string.
